# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Azure.ActiveDirectory/b2cDirectories"
    apiVersion: "2017-03-01"
    name: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      displayName: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
      passwordCredentials:
        - startDate: "[utcNow()]"
          endDate: "[addDays(utcNow(), 30)]"
          secret: "[guid()]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('subscriptionId'), parameters('servicePrincipalName'), 'Contributor')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId'), '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('contributorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Azure.ActiveDirectory/b2cDirectories/', parameters('servicePrincipalName')), '2017-03-01').id]"
      scope: "[concat('/subscriptions/', parameters('subscriptionId')]"
parameters:
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the Service Principal to be created."
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The location where the Service Principal will be created."
  subscriptionId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Subscription ID where the role will be assigned."
  contributorRoleId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The role ID for the Contributor role. This can be retrieved from Azure."
